summary: Tested Performance Tracker features: 1) Pipeline status rows are clickable with blue text and dotted underline, navigating to /leads?status=<status>. 2) Leads page correctly shows status filter pre-applied. 3) Comparison endpoint returns cumulative existing_accounts and new_accounts based on onboarded_month/year. 4) Pipeline metrics show correct INR values from opportunity_estimation. 5) Revenue override and reset functionality works correctly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing H2 2026 Sales Target plan with Rajesh Kumar resource
context_for_next_testing_agent: Performance Tracker features verified: Pipeline rows clickable with blue text/dotted underline, navigation to /leads?status=<status> works, Leads page shows filter pre-applied. Comparison endpoint returns cumulative existing_accounts and new_accounts based on onboarded_month/year. Rajesh Kumar has 1 qualified lead with ₹1,69,200 pipeline value. Current test data shows 0 accounts for all resources (expected per main agent context).
